    S

    SECOND_RESERVED - Enum constant in enum class Controller.Enums.ComponentOrigin
     
    SecondCombatZone2BatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone because the player does not have enough goods.
    SecondCombatZone2BatteryRemovalState(Context, int) - Constructor for class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.SecondCombatZone2BatteryRemovalState
     
    SecondSmugglersBatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.Smugglers
    This state manages the penalty phase for players who failed to match the smugglers' power and also lack sufficient goods to discard.
    SecondSmugglersBatteryRemovalState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Smugglers.SecondSmugglersBatteryRemovalState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context and a specific amount.

    Sends a message over the network.

    Sends a message to the server.

    sendAll() - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Sends the current game state and any queued action to all players.

    setUpcomingCardDeck() - Method in class Model.Board.FlightBoard
    Sets the upcoming card deck by combining all peekable card decks and the hidden card deck, shuffling them, and clearing the peekable card decks and the hidden card deck.

    skipReward(String) - Method in class Controller.AbandonedShip.AbandonedShipDecidingState
    Called when a player decides to skip the abandoned ship reward.
    skipReward(String) - Method in class Controller.AbandonedStation.AbandonedStationDecidingState
    Called when a player chooses to skip the abandoned station reward.
    skipReward(String) - Method in class Controller.Controller
     
    skipReward(String) - Method in class Controller.Pirates.PiratesRewardState
    Allows the player to skip the reward.
    skipReward(String) - Method in class Controller.Slavers.SlaversRewardsState
    Allows the current player to skip their reward.
    skipReward(String) - Method in class Controller.State
     
    SkipRewardCommand - Class in Controller.Commands
    Command for skipping available rewards.

    Slavers - Class in Model.Board.AdventureCards
    Represents a slavers encounter card in the game.
    Slavers(int, CardLevel, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Slavers
     
    Slavers(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Slavers
     
    SlaversBatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.Slavers
    This state handles the battery removal process for a player attempting to boost their power during the "Slavers" encounter.
    SlaversBatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.Slavers.SlaversBatteryRemovalState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context and power values.
    SlaversCrewRemovalState - Class in Controller.Slavers
    This state handles the forced removal of crewmates from players' ships during the "Slavers" encounter, specifically for players who failed to surpass the slavers' power.
    SlaversCrewRemovalState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Slavers.SlaversCrewRemovalState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context.
    SlaversPowerDeclarationState - Class in Controller.Slavers
    This state handles the declaration of cannon power by players during the "Slavers" encounter.
    SlaversPowerDeclarationState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Slavers.SlaversPowerDeclarationState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context.
    SlaversRewardsState - Class in Controller.Slavers
    This state manages the reward phase during the "Slavers" event, allowing players who successfully surpassed the slavers' power to claim their reward (Credits), or to skip it entirely.
    SlaversRewardsState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Slavers.SlaversRewardsState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context.
    Smugglers - Class in Model.Board.AdventureCards
    Represents a smugglers adventure card in the game.
    Smugglers(int, CardLevel, int, int, int, List<Good>) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Smugglers
     
    Smugglers(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Smugglers
     
    SmugglersBatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.Smugglers
    This state handles the removal of batteries from a player's ship during the "Smugglers" event.
    SmugglersBatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersBatteryRemovalState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context and power values.
    SmugglersGoodsRemovalState - Class in Controller.Smugglers
    This state manages the forced removal of goods from a player's ship during the "Smugglers" event, if they failed to surpass the smugglers' power threshold.
    SmugglersGoodsRemovalState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersGoodsRemovalState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context.
    SmugglersLandState - Class in Controller.Smugglers
    This state handles the phase where a player who successfully surpassed the smugglers' power gets to collect rewards in the form of goods.
    SmugglersLandState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersLandState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context.
    SmugglersPowerDeclarationState - Class in Controller.Smugglers
    This state handles the declaration of cannon power by players during the "Smugglers" event.
    SmugglersPowerDeclarationState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersPowerDeclarationState
    Constructor to initialize the state with the current game context.
